Title: Software Engineer (Backend – .NET)
Description:
We are looking for a Backend Software Engineer to design, build, and maintain scalable APIs using .NET technologies. You will work closely with frontend developers and product managers to deliver high-quality features.

Responsibilities:

Develop RESTful APIs using ASP.NET Core
Design and optimize database schemas (PostgreSQL / SQL Server)
Implement background services and messaging systems (e.g., RabbitMQ)
Write clean, maintainable, and testable code

Requirements:

Strong experience with C# and .NET Core
Familiarity with microservices architecture
Experience with relational databases
Understanding of async programming

Title: Frontend Developer (React)
Description:
Seeking a Frontend Developer to build responsive and user-friendly web applications using React. You will collaborate with designers and backend engineers to create seamless user experiences.

Responsibilities:

Develop UI components using React and TypeScript
Integrate APIs and handle state management
Optimize applications for performance and scalability
Ensure cross-browser compatibility

Requirements:

Strong proficiency in JavaScript, React, and TypeScript
Experience with modern frontend tools (Vite, Webpack)
Understanding of REST APIs
Familiarity with UI/UX principles

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
We are hiring a Data Analyst to interpret data and provide actionable insights to support business decisions. You will work with large datasets and present findings to stakeholders.

Responsibilities:

Analyze datasets using SQL and Python
Create dashboards and visualizations (Power BI / Tableau)
Identify trends and patterns
Communicate insights clearly

Requirements:

Strong SQL skills
Experience with data visualization tools
Basic knowledge of statistics
Attention to detail

Title: Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
Looking for a Machine Learning Engineer to develop and deploy predictive models. You will be responsible for building pipelines and optimizing model performance.

Responsibilities:

Build and train ML models (e.g., classification, regression)
Work with time-series or structured data
Optimize models using hyperparameter tuning
Deploy models into production

Requirements:

Experience with Python and ML frameworks (TensorFlow / PyTorch)
Knowledge of model evaluation metrics
Familiarity with data preprocessing
Understanding of deep learning concepts

Title: DevOps Engineer
Description:
We are seeking a DevOps Engineer to manage CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure. You will ensure system reliability, scalability, and security.

Responsibilities:

Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines
Manage cloud infrastructure (AWS / Azure / GCP)
Monitor system performance and uptime
Automate deployment processes

Requirements:

Experience with Docker and Kubernetes
Knowledge of cloud platforms
Familiarity with scripting (Bash / Python)
Understanding of networking and security
